title: 當年路知巷聞嘅英文歌有冇人想聽？

replies.msg: 唔講冷門野，唔講某genre入面出名嘅歌。講以前當普遍大眾黎講好紅好出名嘅英文歌。
Never gonna give you up
you're beautiful

拋磚
以前成日跟老豆聽依啲
總有一啲係新一代都聽過 又或者搵下有冇一首你聽過又唔知/唔記得名嘅佳作
總之就些牙起碼都十幾廿年左右歷史嘅舊歌

https://youtu.be/w3QdibF8pyo
Without you - Harry Nilsson
I can't live if living is without you


https://youtu.be/uVf940pO5ME
Sometimes when we touch - Dan Hill
And sometimes when we touch
The honesty's too much
And I have to close my eyes and hide
I want to hold you till I die
Till we both break down and cry
I want to hold you till the fear in me subsides


https://youtu.be/zqq3tW3iACw
Hard to say I'm sorry - Chicago
Hold me now
It's hard for me to say I'm sorry
I really want to tell you I'm sorry
I could never let you go
And after all that we've been through
I will make it up to you
I promise you
You're just a part of me I can't let go
Never gonna give you up
you're beautiful

Never gonna give you up



當年中唔少伏

Without you - Harry Nilsson (1971)
最原唱唔係依個version，但依個version出左名
之後到Mariah Carey係80s翻唱多次


Sometimes when we touch - Dan Hill (1978)


Hard to say I'm sorry - Chicago (1982)

https://youtu.be/TR3Vdo5etCQ
Don't speak - No Doubt (1996)
Don't speak
I know just what you're saying
So please stop explaining
Don't tell me cause it hurts
Don't speak
I know what you're thinking
I don't need your reasons
Don't tell me cause it hurts


https://youtu.be/Ss0kFNUP4P4
I don't wanna miss a thing - Aerosmith (1998)
I don't wanna close my eyes
I don't wanna fall asleep
'Cause I'd miss you, babe
And I don't wanna miss a thing
'Cause even when I dream of you
The sweetest dream will never do
I'd still miss you, babe
And I don't wanna miss a thing
Carpenters都無

https://youtu.be/PlrWUiK-vNo
Yesterday once more - Carpenters (1973)
when I was young I'd listen to the radio
Waitin' for my favourite songs


https://youtu.be/6inwzOooXRU
Close to you - Carpenters
Why do birds suddenly appear
Every time you are near?
Just like me, they long to be
Close to you

https://youtu.be/NpqmGx7meQw
How deep is your love - Bee Gees
How deep is your love?
I really mean to learn
'Cause we're living in a world of fools
Breaking us down when they all should let us be
We belong to you and me

Carpenters都無

打梗字
How deep is your love - Bee Gees (1977)
Big Big Girl

moonlight shadow同我咁老34年前既歌，十幾歲個陣開始聽英文歌，當時聽阿媽講首歌o係佢地年代必聽英文歌，之後我就認識左呢首歌喇。Share比大家:

https://youtu.be/e80qhyovOnA

但我鐘意remix版多d

https://youtu.be/5gHGIY1Q-yU
有冇air supply撚

https://youtu.be/JWdZEumNRmI
All out of Love - Air Supply (1980)
I'm all out of love, I'm so lost without you
I know you were right believing for so long
I'm all out of love, what am I without you
I can't be too late to say that I was so wrong


https://youtu.be/Dx1XtKbEtfE
Killing me softly with his song - Roberta Flack (1973) (好似唔係第一個唱不過最出名)
Strumming my pain with his fingers
Singing my life with his words
Killing me softly with his song
Killing me softly with his song
Telling my whole life with his words
Killing me softly with his song


https://youtu.be/vfBboBz3yoc
Smoke gets in your eyes - The Platters (1958) (最早應該係musical歌黎，再舊十幾廿年，frank sinatra都唱過，但依個version好似最hit)
Something here inside
Cannot be denied
They said someday you´ll find
All who love are blind
When your heart's on fire
You must realize
Smoke gets in your eyes
